descriptionEn: Name may mean "illuminating." He is the son of Maath and father of Eslie or Esli, a Judahite appearing in Luke's genealogy of Jesus Christ.

verses.line: Which was the son of Mattathias, which was the son of Amos, which was the son of Naum, which was the son of Esli, which was the son of Nagge,

images.caption: Which was the son of Mattathias, which was the son of Amos, which was the son of Naum, which was the son of Esli, which was the son of Nagge, (Luke 3:25)
